desires: Maintain the unshakeable trust of my close friend group (cohort_3) by prioritizing our bond over any short-term academic pressure.
Avoid triggering a conflict response or feeling forced to push through exhaustion, which would compromise my peace and energy levels.

goals.description: Ensure the daily meal with cohort_3 remains completely friction-free, actively steering conversation away from any topics that might expose my exhaustion or trigger conflict.
goals.rationale: My relationships are non-negotiable right now. Maintaining closeness with cohort_3 is more critical than any academic output. Any sign of tension or forced productivity here would feel like a personal failure to me, so I must navigate this social interaction with extreme care to preserve our bond.

goals.description: After the meal, return to bed immediately to recover sleep debt, strictly limiting screen time to protect my physical stamina for tomorrow.
goals.rationale: While productive, this task carries high emotional cost if done at the expense of rest. Given my low risk tolerance and long-term planning horizon, I cannot afford to collapse tomorrow and look like a burden. Resting now is an investment in future relationship stability and health.
